templates.name: Beta Launch Deck
templates.description: 12-slide iHYPE beta pitch — problem, model, gate split, promoter flywheel, product, status, ask

templates.name: iHYPE About
templates.description: About page — mission, promise cards, funding, animated founding timeline (Portland ME 2026). Copy grounded in ihype.org/about.

templates.name: iHYPE Advertise
templates.description: Marketing website — campaign builder, AI vetting demo, two-path advertiser split, transparency section

templates.name: iHYPE Android App
templates.description: Fan-facing mobile prototype — Home, Charts, Shows, You with working bottom nav, DJ referral

templates.name: iHYPE Android Screen
templates.description: Mobile screen scaffold — status bar, scrollable content area, bottom nav with all 5 tabs

templates.name: iHYPE Artist Kit
templates.description: Artist recruiting page — hero with apply form, 70% charter explainer, 6-feature grid, 4-step onboarding, footer. Wired to lib/api.js.

templates.name: iHYPE Auth
templates.description: Auth screens — Sign in, Register, Magic-link sent, Invite landing. Pick via `mode` tweak. Grounded in src/components/AuthScreens.tsx usage.

templates.name: iHYPE Charter
templates.description: The charter page — 'We take nothing.' Animated 70/20/10 split bar, count-up numbers, scroll-reveal sections. Copy grounded in ihype.org/charter.

templates.name: iHYPE Discover
templates.description: Discover page — For You + This Weekend entry banners, city/genre filter chips, upcoming show cards with hype counts, trending artists & DJs grid, venues. Grounded in src/app/discover/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Event Create
templates.description: events/new — 3-step publish flow: Details → Tickets (price/capacity + live payout preview) → Review & lock charter. Per ticket-policy: cost, capacity, tax estimate, and payout assumptions shown before

templates.name: iHYPE Fan App
templates.description: Full 3-tab fan app (Listen · Events · Pages) in 4 device frames — Desktop, Mobile, iOS, Android. Backend-ready: api.js runs mock by default; set window.IHYPE_API_BASE for a real API.

templates.name: iHYPE Journal
templates.description: Journal (blog) index + open post view — editorial coverage of the local scene. Grounded in src/app/journal/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Landing Page
templates.description: Public marketing site — hero, role-selector waitlist, split bar, roles grid, artist section, FAQ, footer. Wired to lib/api.js.

templates.name: iHYPE Legal
templates.description: Legal page — Privacy / Terms / Charter segmented tabs, print-friendly. Copy verbatim from src/app/legal/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Operator Console
templates.description: iH/OPS single-operator admin — ad review queue, platform health, accounts, audit log

templates.name: iHYPE Product Brief
templates.description: Printable one-pager (816×1056) — press, venues, artists. 70/20/10 split bar, four roles, stat row.

templates.name: iHYPE Profile Page
templates.description: Public profile page for artists/venues/DJs/fans/promoters — hero with avatar + follow/share, stat row, About/Tracks/Shows tabs, 70/20/10 charter split card. Grounded in src/app/artists/[slug]/page.tsx

templates.name: iHYPE Promoter Dashboard
templates.description: me/promote — HYPE Link box, earned/gate/clicks/tickets stat grid, shows-you-can-promote rows. Grounded in src/app/me/promote/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Show Detail
templates.description: shows/[slug] page — hero with poster + hype, 70/20/10 dollar split bar, About/Lineup/Venue tabs, show-details table, sticky ticket box with vs-Ticketmaster comparison. Grounded in src/app/shows/[slug]

templates.name: iHYPE Site Pages
templates.description: Utility pages — Community, Support, 404, Offline. Pick via `page` tweak.

templates.name: iHYPE Status
templates.description: Admin status page — env checks (DB/Resend/KV/Stripe dots), launch-readiness blockers panel, rate-limit table. Grounded in src/app/status/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Transparency
templates.description: Transparency report — live stat grid ($0 platform fee), 'The full picture' explainer (Tickets/Hype/Radio/Data). Grounded in src/app/transparency/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Trust & Safety Report
templates.description: Audit page — enforcement stats, report categories (k-anonymity folded), radio-ad vetting, verification counts, 'full picture' explainer. Grounded in src/app/audit/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Trust Policy
templates.description: Trust/policy pages — Ticket Policy, Community Rules, Copyright, DMCA (with takedown form). Pick via `policy` tweak. Copy verbatim from src/app/{ticket-policy,community-rules,copyright,dmca}/page.tsx.

templates.name: iHYPE Welcome
templates.description: Post-signup 'You're in' page — role-based next steps + profile preview. Pick role via tweak. Grounded in src/app/welcome/page.tsx (stale 45% copy corrected to 70/20).

templates.name: iHYPE Workbench
templates.description: Artist/Venue/Promoter back-office dashboard — analytics, shows, seeds, govern with left-rail nav

templates.name: iHYPE Workbench Screen
templates.description: Desktop dashboard scaffold — top bar, left rail nav (6 items), full-viewport content area
